signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Some players thrive on making defenders look silly. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their fakeout rate on the next juke, spin or hurdle.
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable juke animations.
Ballcarriers with this ability will hold onto the ball if tackled during a hurdle
Ballcarriers with this ability will replenish a portion of their stamina upon successfully performing any skill move
Zone Hawk defenders lock down a part of the field. When they enter the zone, this ability increases the rate of interceptions while in zone coverage.
Players with this ability have an increased chance to catch passes that have been tipped into the air.
Defenders with this ability will cause heavy fatigue penalties when tackling a ballcarrier with a hit-stick tackle.
Defenders with this ability have a larger timing window for landing Perfect Hit Sticks

signatureAbility.signatureActivationDescription: Make consecutive passes for 5+ yards in air
signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Many passers use a combination of mobility and aggressiveness to make big plays. When they enter the zone, they have perfect accuracy while throwing on the run.
Passers with this ability receive better blocking support on designed quarterback run plays.
Ballcarriers with this ability have steerable juke animations.
While in the pocket, passers with this ability are almost guaranteed to evade the first sack attempt by a blitzing defensive back.
Passers with this ability have perfect accuracy on all throws under 40 yards while running outside the pocket (except on high/low throws).
Blockers with this ability will allow less frequent shed attempts by their block target
Blockers with this ability reduce an edge pass rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
Players with this ability are more likely to succeed at and attempt diving catches and swats.
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in any flat zone coverage, less than 10 yards from the LoS and outside the hash marks.
Players with this ability have an increased chance to catch passes that have been tipped into the air.
After securing a RAC catch, ballcarriers with this ability can quickly shift momentum, change direction, and turn the corner without sacrificing speed.
Ballcarriers with this ability are effective at recovering from attempted tackles regardless of their current stamina.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS.
Blockers with this ability gain blocker resistance points as a faster rate
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability will dominantly win impact blocks on screen plays
Defenders with this ability are rarely faked out by ballcarrier moves (and cannot be faked out when user-controlled).
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in any mid-field zone coverage, less than 20 yards from the LoS inside the numbers and 10-20 outside.
Zone Hawk defenders lock down a part of the field. When they enter the zone, this ability increases the rate of interceptions while in zone coverage.
Defenders with this ability have a greater chance of forcing fumbles when landing Perfect Hit Sticks
Defenders with this ability can still tackle effectively while trying to strip the football.
